text: 203 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «لاَ يُبْغِضُنَا إِلاَّ مَنْ خَبُثَتْ وِلاَدَتُهُ أَوْ حَمَلَتْ بِهِ أُمُّهُ فِي حَيْضِهَا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.203 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
'No one harbors hatred toward us except one whose birth was impure or whose mother conceived him while She was menstruating.'
